message:
perf(tui): eliminate duplicate list_panes IPC call in health()

The health() function was calling list_panes() twice - once for
wezterm_accessible check and once for pane_count. Each call triggers
an IPC call to WezTerm. Now calls once and reuses the Result.

- Store list_panes() result in panes_result variable
- Use as_ref().is_ok_and() to check accessibility without consuming
- Use map_or() to extract count, defaulting to 0 on error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
